'''lalowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:feastware|feastware]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-l-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:feastware|feastware]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| lalowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:læleweth|læleweth]] || [[word:lælewej|lælewej]] || [[word:lælewesh|lælewesh]] || [[word:lælewe|lælewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lalolowoth|lalolowoth]] || [[word:lalolowoj|lalolowoj]] || [[word:lalolowosh|lalolowosh]] || [[word:lalolowo|lalolowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lalowoth|lalowoth]] || [[word:lalowoj|lalowoj]] || [[word:lalowosh|lalowosh]] || [[word:lalowo|lalowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lalofwoth|lalofwoth]] || [[word:lalofwoj|lalofwoj]] || [[word:lalofwosh|lalofwosh]] || [[word:lalofwof|lalofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lalowotho|lalowotho]] || [[word:lalowojo|lalowojo]] || [[word:lalowosho|lalowosho]] || [[word:lalowoko|lalowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lalowoth|lalowoth]] || [[word:lalowoj|lalowoj]] || [[word:lalowosh|lalowosh]] || [[word:lalowo|lalowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lalowothol|lalowothol]] || [[word:lalowojol|lalowojol]] || [[word:lalowoshol|lalowoshol]] || [[word:lalowokol|lalowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lalowothotho|lalowothotho]] || [[word:lalowojojo|lalowojojo]] || [[word:lalowoshosho|lalowoshosho]] || [[word:lalowoko|lalowoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lalowothon|lalowothon]] || [[word:lalowojon|lalowojon]] || [[word:lalowoshon|lalowoshon]] || [[word:lalowokon|lalowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lalowothoro|lalowothoro]] || [[word:lalowojoro|lalowojoro]] || [[word:lalowoshoro|lalowoshoro]] || [[word:lalowokoro|lalowokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
